items.name: hello-model
items.description: Build your first AI model from scratch in pure Python. No frameworks, no magic - just y = mx + b, gradient descent, and 7 houses. A hello-world for machine learning.

items.name: David-ML-Scanner-V2
items.description: David-ML is a sophisticated machine learning framework designed for quantitative traders and financial analysts seeking to build, test, and deploy advanced trading strategies. Built entirely in Python, this project combines cutting-edge ML algorithms with comprehensive backtesting capabilities and real-time decision-making systems.

items.name: Quantum-Satellite-Monitoring-Assistant
items.description: A quantum machine learning framework for satellite data analysis, exploring Quantum Neural Networks and Quantum SVMs for satellite imagery and telemetry in the NISQ era and comparing with Classical counterparts.

items.name: seu-injection-framework
items.description: A Framework for Developing Robust Machine Learning Models in Harsh Environments

items.name: Antibody-Encoder-Project
items.description: Created an Antibody Encoder using a Masked Machine Learning model, New Sentence Prediction Model, etc. Even created a speciaqlized optuna framework for my encoder.

items.name: MIND-AI-mood-tracker-platform
items.description: MindAI is an enterprise-grade, AI-powered mental health platform. It combines clinical psychological frameworks (PHQ-9) with machine learning (Scikit-learn) to predict burnout and provide personalized behavioral interventions. Built with a scalable microservices architecture using Django, PostgreSQL, and React.

items.name: Tree-Parameters-Estimation
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework for estimating tree crown parameters from airborne LiDAR point clouds. The method fits parametric crown models to LiDAR data using PyTorch optimization, enabling automated estimation of tree position, size, and canopy structure.

items.name: DeepFlow-ML-Intelligence
items.description: 🧠 High-performance Distributed Machine Learning Framework for Federated Learning and Optimization.

items.name: context-aware-flight-delay-prediction-using-machine-learning
items.description: An end-to-end context-aware ML framework for predicting U.S. airline delays using ensemble learning, SHAP, and DiCE counterfactuals

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: CTDF
items.description: This repository contains the implementation of the CTDF (Cross-Temporal Downscaling-Fusion) framework, a two-stage machine learning approach for generating high spatiotemporal resolution precipitation products from multi-source remote sensing data.

items.name: quantum-neural-architecture
items.description: An experiment to work with quantum machine learning framework with Variational Quantum Circuits(VQC) as a tunable circuit.

items.name: Mitigation-of-DDoS-Attacks-in-SDN-Networks-Using-Random-Forest-Classifier
items.description: Machine learning based DDoS attack detection and mitigation framework for Software Defined Networks (SDN) using Random Forest classifier with feature engineering and SDN controller integration.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: Q-IDS
items.description: Q-IDS is a hybrid intrusion detection framework combining classical machine learning and quantum-inspired techniques for network traffic analysis and real-time monitoring.

items.name: quanta-cure-gnn-drug-discovery2
items.description: Quanta Cure is an AI-driven drug discovery framework using Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to model molecular structures and predict protein–ligand binding affinity. It integrates RDKit, PyTorch Geometric, and datasets like ChEMBL and PDBBind to build molecular graphs for machine learning–based drug candidate screening.

items.name: ml-benchmark-suite
items.description: Framework for benchmarking machine learning models across datasets and performance metrics.

items.name: SecureSME-Platform
items.description: An experimental cloud-native runtime security framework utilizing eBPF syscall telemetry and Unsupervised Machine Learning to detect zero-day container escapes in Kubernetes.

items.description: Machine Learning framework for energy consumption forecasting using time-series data with Linear Regression, ARIMA, LSTM, and a Streamlit dashboard.

It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.
